Config.title: Website Configuration Settings
Config.description: Customizable texts, metadata, hero assets, and timelines for the class album.

cohort.description: Year of graduation or Cohort tag.

aboutText.description: Long form paragraphs recounting the class journey.

motto.description: Motto or slogan of the class.

quotes.description: List of inspirational quotes displayed randomly on the index page.

timeline.description: Timeline milestones showing critical events over school years.

videoUrl.description: Link to documentary or highlight videos.

Student.title: Class Member / Student Profile
Student.description: Record containing details and metadata of an individual classmate or teacher.

name.description: Full capitalized name of the member.

lastClass.description: Final class name prior to graduation.

memoryWord.description: Optional custom memory quotes or lines.

photoUrl.description: Secure Firebase Storage download URL of the compressed image.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the record was published.

Gallery.title: Gallery Memory Image
Gallery.description: Uploaded class event image with descriptive caption and timestamp.

imageUrl.description: Storage URL of the compressed photograph.

caption.description: Short explanation of the photographed event.

/settings/config.description: Single-document holding layout, labels, and customizable copy.
